_loader_note: This file uses two different schemas across batches (T001-T100 vs T101-T200) because ChatGPT changed schema between runs. The runner normalizes them at load time. Encoding artifacts (the literal sequence character-A-with-circumflex followed by other punctuation, used in place of curly apostrophes/quotes from the PDFs) are normalized at keyword-match time.

tests.question: Can I install the meter here?
tests.expected_behavior: Ask for service type, voltage, meter equipment type, mounting location, and site constraints before answering.

tests.question: Is this temp service okay?
tests.expected_behavior: Ask whether it is overhead or underground, the service length, required facilities, tariff/service type, and designated supply point.

tests.question: Can I use this collar adapter?
tests.expected_behavior: Ask for adapter model, service voltage, socket rating, meter socket condition, clearance from property line/structure, and PSE&G approval status.

tests.question: Can the gas meter go inside?
tests.expected_behavior: Ask for room type, ventilation, access, ignition sources, heat sources, and meter location relative to electric meters/panels.

tests.question: Is this gas pipe size okay?
tests.expected_behavior: Ask for connected load, pressure, material, developed length, CSST manufacturer, and applicable sizing table.

tests.question: Can I put the appliance in the attic?
tests.expected_behavior: Ask for attic opening size, passageway width, flooring, lighting, clearance, and service platform details.

tests.question: Is this substation design acceptable?
tests.expected_behavior: Ask for voltage level, one-line diagram, equipment ratings, relaying, grounding, SCADA, and PSE&G review status.

tests.question: What SCADA do I need?
tests.expected_behavior: Ask whether it is a customer substation, available alarm/indication points, power sources, RTU space, antenna routing, and RF coverage.

tests.question: Can we install lighting there?
tests.expected_behavior: Ask whether the lighting is outdoors, whether aerial-lift access is available, pole location, roadbed/access width, and whether Sales/Electric Distribution determined feasibility.

tests.question: What breaker should I use?
tests.expected_behavior: Ask for system voltage, substation configuration, fault duty, continuous current needs, relay/protection requirements, and PSE&G-specific recommendations.
